files.content:
extends layout

block content
  header.hero
    .badge.badge-error
      span.dot.dot-error
      span Status #{error.status || 500}
    h1
      span.gradient-text-error #{message}
    p.lede
      | Something didn't go right. The full stack trace is below in development mode.
    .hero-actions
      a.btn.btn-primary(href='/') ← Back to home

  if error.stack
    section.console-card
      header
        h3 Stack trace
      pre.code
        code= error.stack

extends layout block content header.hero .badge span.dot span Express #{version} · running on port #{port} h1!= 'Your Node.js server, wired and ready.' p.lede!= 'This page rendered from Jade in views/index.jade. Routes live in routes/. Static assets are served from public/.' .hero-actions a.btn.btn-primary(href='/api/info', target='_blank') GET /api/info a.btn.btn-ghost(href='/api/quote', target='_blank') GET /api/quote a.btn.btn-ghost(href='/users') GET /users section.console-card header h3 Server status span.dot.dot-small .metrics .metric .metric-label Uptime .metric-value(data-live='uptime') #{uptime} .metric .metric-label Started .metric-value #{startedAt} .metric .metric-label Memory (heap) .metric-value #{memoryUsed} MB .metric .metric-label Node .metric-value #{nodeVersion} .metric .metric-label Platform .metric-value #{platform} .metric .metric-label PID .metric-value #{pid} h2.section-title Routes section.grid article.card header span.tag GET h2 / (this page) p!= 'Rendered through Jade. Edit views/index.jade to change what you’re reading. Reload the tab to see it.' pre.code code. router.get('/', (req, res) => { res.render('index', { title: 'Spck Express' }); }); article.card header span.tag GET · JSON h2 /api/info p!= 'Returns a small JSON document about the server — useful as a health check or to test fetch from the client.' pre.code code. app.use('/api', apiRouter); a.btn.btn-small.btn-ghost(href='/api/info', target='_blank') Open in new tab article.card header span.tag GET · JSON h2 /api/quote p A random programming quote. Hit it twice — the response changes each time, demonstrating server-side state. a.btn.btn-small.btn-ghost(href='/api/quote', target='_blank') Open in new tab article.card header span.tag POST · JSON h2 /api/echo p Echoes the JSON body you send back to you, with a server timestamp added. Try it from the "Live request" panel below. article.card header span.tag GET h2 /users · /users/:id p!= 'A second router lives in routes/users.js. Use it as a template when you add your own resources.' article.card header span.tag middleware h2 morgan + body parsing p!= 'Requests are logged to the terminal via morgan('dev'). JSON and form bodies are parsed automatically before they reach your route.' section.live-request header h3 Live request · POST /api/echo span.muted Try it without leaving the page. .live-body label span Request body (JSON) textarea#echo-input(spellcheck='false') {"message":"hello from express","level":1} label span Response pre#echo-output Idle. button#echo-send.btn.btn-primary Send POST .live-meta | Tip: open DevTools then Network and watch the request fly. From a shell: br code curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"hi":1}' http://localhost:#{port}/api/echo footer.foot p!= 'Edit the entry in app.js · routes in routes/ · views in views/.'

doctype html
html(lang='en')
  head
    meta(charset='utf-8')
    meta(name='viewport', content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover')
    meta(name='theme-color', content='#0a1018')
    title= title
    link(rel='stylesheet', href='/stylesheets/style.css')
  body
    .bg-grid(aria-hidden='true')
    main#app
      block content
    script(src='/javascripts/main.js')
